title: Theme Studies
description: Three independent studies for the Micro-Macro Infographic theme.
creative_direction: A first-pass single-image package for Micro-Macro Infographic: one core demonstration, one applied system, and one gallery-oriented variation, all focused on structured layout and clear information hierarchy, credible real-world light, texture, and camera behavior, material physics, optical behavior, and tactile surface detail, reasoned multi-part visual storytelling.

generation_plan.ref_strategy: No references; each image is independent.
generation_plan.index_policy: Only status=done images with image.png are included in works/index.json.

en.title: Theme Studies
en.description: Three independent studies for the Micro-Macro Infographic theme.
